questions.question: 6 people sit around a circular table facing the center. A is opposite C. B is immediate right of A. Who is immediate left of C?
questions.solution: Step 1: Opposite means n/2 apart (6 seats). Step 2: Place A, then B to A's right, C opposite A. Step 3: Left of C is D. Answer: D.

questions.question: 7 people sit around a circular table facing the center. A is opposite C. B is immediate right of A. Who is immediate left of C?
questions.solution: Step 1: Opposite means n/2 apart (7 seats). Step 2: Place A, then B to A's right, C opposite A. Step 3: Left of C is B. Answer: B.
